channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar - To Be Discontinued
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records with status To Be Discontinued from openFDA.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Lamotrigine Tablet, Extended Release (49884-561-11)
item.description: Lamotrigine, Tablet, Extended Release, 25 mg (NDC 49884-561-11) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-29 Company: Par Health, Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Lamotrigine Tablet, Extended Release (49884-562-11)
item.description: Lamotrigine, Tablet, Extended Release, 50 mg (NDC 49884-562-11) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-29 Company: Par Health, Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Lamotrigine Tablet, Extended Release (49884-563-11)
item.description: Lamotrigine, Tablet, Extended Release, 100 mg (NDC 49884-563-11) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-29 Company: Par Health, Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Lamotrigine Tablet, Extended Release (49884-564-11)
item.description: Lamotrigine, Tablet, Extended Release, 200 mg (NDC 49884-564-11) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-29 Company: Par Health, Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Lamotrigine Tablet, Extended Release (49884-604-11)
item.description: Lamotrigine, Tablet, Extended Release, 250 mg (NDC 49884-604-11) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-29 Company: Par Health, Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Lamotrigine Tablet, Extended Release (49884-605-11)
item.description: Lamotrigine, Tablet, Extended Release, 300 mg (NDC 49884-605-11) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-29 Company: Par Health, Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Crinecerfont Capsule (70370-5025-1)
item.description: Crenessity, Capsule, 25 mg (NDC 70370-5025-1) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-28 Company: Neurocrine Biosciences, Inc. Neurocrine is discontinuing only the 25 mg soft gel capsule dose strength (NDC 70370-5025-01). The 50mg and 100mg soft gel capsule dose strength (NDC 70370-5050-1 and 70370-5100-1), and 50 mg/mL oral solution will continue to be marketed (NDC 70370-5250-1).

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Etravirine Tablet (10147-0570-1)
item.description: Etravirine, Tablet, 100 mg (NDC 10147-0570-1) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-28 Company: Janssen Research and Development Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Etravirine Tablet (59676-570-01)
item.description: Intelence, Tablet, 100 mg (NDC 59676-570-01) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-28 Company: Janssen Research and Development Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Furosemide Injection (25021-311-02)
item.description: Furosemide, Injection, 10 mg/1 mL (NDC 25021-311-02) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-28 Company: Gland Pharma Limited Distributed by Sagent Pharmaceuticals; Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Furosemide Injection (25021-311-04)
item.description: Furosemide, Injection, 10 mg/1 mL (NDC 25021-311-04) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-28 Company: Gland Pharma Limited Distributed by Sagent Pharmaceuticals; Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Furosemide Injection (25021-311-10)
item.description: Furosemide, Injection, 10 mg/1 mL (NDC 25021-311-10) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-28 Company: Gland Pharma Limited Distributed by Sagent Pharmaceuticals; Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Palbociclib Capsule (0069-0187-21)
item.description: Ibrance, Capsule, 75 mg (NDC 0069-0187-21) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-22 Company: Pfizer Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacturing of the capsule presentation. 75 mg Tablet NDC 0069-0284-03 will continue to be manufactured.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Palbociclib Capsule (0069-0188-21)
item.description: Ibrance, Capsule, 100 mg (NDC 0069-0188-21) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-22 Company: Pfizer Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacturing of the capsule presentation. 100 mg Tablet NDC 0069-0486-03 will continue to be manufactured.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Dexmedetomidine Hydrochloride Injection (16729-239-93)
item.description: Dexmedetomidine Hydrochloride, Injection, 100 ug/1 mL (NDC 16729-239-93) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-21 Company: Accord Healthcare Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Ketorolac Tromethamine, Tablet, 10 mg (NDC 0378-1134-01) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-20 Company: Mylan Pharmaceuticals Inc., a Viatris Company Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Emend, Oral Powder for Suspension, 125 mg (NDC 0006-3066-03) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-08 Company: Merck Sharp & Dohme LLC To be discontinued in approximately November 2026.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Ramelteon Tablet (64764-805-10)
item.description: Rozerem, Tablet, 8 mg (NDC 64764-805-10) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-03-19 Company: Takeda Pharmaceuticals USA Inc. Product is expected to be available through February 2027.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Ramelteon Tablet (64764-805-30)
item.description: Rozerem, Tablet, 8 mg (NDC 64764-805-30) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-03-19 Company: Takeda Pharmaceuticals USA Inc. Product is expected to be available through June 2027.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Plerixafor Injection (65219-284-12)
item.description: Plerixafor, Injection, 24 mg per 1.2 mL (20 mg per mL) (NDC 65219-284-12) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-03-13 Company: Fresenius Kabi USA, LLC A business decision was made to discontinue manufacture of the drug.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Peritoneal Dialysis Solution (46163-206-92)
